data.description:
4th-level abjuration
Casting Time: action
Range: 60 feet
Components: V, S, M (an item distasteful to the target)
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute

You attempt to send a creature you see within range to another plane of existence. If the target is on its native plane of existence, you banish it to a harmless demiplane. While there, the target is incapacitated. It remains until the spell ends, at which point the target reappears in the space it left or the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied. If the target is native to a different plane of existence than one you're on, the target is banished with a popping noise and returns to its home plane after 1 minute has passed. If the target's home plane doesn't exist, the spell fails. At Higher Levels: When cast using a slot of 5th level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each level above 4th.
